basic_details.job_title: Delhi University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 13 Research Assistant, Field Investigator and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Research Associate, Research Assistant, Field Investigator
basic_details.short_information: Delhi University Research Associate, Research Assistant, Field Investigator Notification 2026 has been released on 25 June 2026 on the official website du.ac.in. A total of 13 vacancies have been announced through the Delhi University Research Associate, Research Assistant, Field Investigator Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with at least 55% marks and NET/M.Phil./Ph.D., Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with at least 55% marks
qualification.details: Research Associate: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with at least 55% marks and NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. Minimum two years of research experience as a Research Assistant in any project. Research Assistant: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with at least 55% marks and NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. Desirable: Experience in any research project. Field Investigator: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with at least 55% marks.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Delhi University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Delhi University Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Delhi University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Delhi University Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Research Associate: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with at least 55% marks and NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. Minimum two years of research experience as a Research Assistant in any project. Research Assistant: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with at least 55% marks and NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. Desirable: Experience in any research project. Field Investigator: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with at least 55% marks.

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Applications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Delhi University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by Delhi University for various posts. This is a great opportunity for candidates seeking contractual government jobs in Delhi.

faq.question: Q2. What are the post names available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The available post names are Research Associate, Research Assistant, and Field Investigator. Candidates can apply for these roles based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q3. How many total vacancies are there in this Delhi University recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 13 vacancies announced for Research Associate, Research Assistant, and Field Investigator positions. Interested candidates should check the post-wise distribution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for these posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Delhi University recruitment is Email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents via email before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply for the Delhi University Research Associate, Research Assistant, Field Investigator posts?
faq.answer: The last date for the submission of applications via email is 16 July 2026. Candidates are advised to send their applications well in advance to avoid last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary range for these posts at Delhi University?
faq.answer: The salary for these posts ranges from Rs. 24,000 to Rs. 47,000 per month, depending on the specific post. Detailed salary information is available in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the minimum qualification required for these positions?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Postgraduate degree in any Social Science discipline with at least 55% marks. Some posts may also require NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. and research experience.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the Delhi University recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Research Associate, Research Assistant, Field Investigator posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts primarily involves an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their applications and called for an interview.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job location for these Delhi University posts?
faq.answer: The job location for these contractual positions is Delhi, specifically within Delhi University. The pincode provided is 110007.
